```{r}
healthy.labels <- paste(as.character(round(healthy.frac, digits=4)*100), "%", sep="")
myeloma.labels <- paste(as.character(round(myeloma.frac, digits=4)*100), "%", sep="")

healthy.pie <- data.frame(group=c("SECs", "AECs", "Fibroblasts", "MSCs", "OLCs", "Pericytes", "Chondrocytes"), 
                          value = healthy.values, 
                          perc = healthy.frac, 
                          labels = healthy.labels)

myeloma.pie <- data.frame(group=c("SECs", "AECs", "Fibroblasts", "MSCs", "OLCs", "Pericytes", "Chondrocytes"), 
                          value = myeloma.values, 
                          perc = myeloma.frac, 
                          labels = myeloma.labels)

healthy.pie <- healthy.pie %>%
  arrange(desc(group)) %>%
  mutate(prop = value / sum(healthy.pie$value)*100) %>%
  mutate(ypos = cumsum(prop) - 0.5 * prop)

myeloma.pie <- myeloma.pie %>%
  arrange(desc(group)) %>%
  mutate(prop = value / sum(myeloma.pie$value)*100) %>%
  mutate(ypos = cumsum(prop) - 0.5 * prop)

healthy.pie.plot <- ggplot(healthy.pie, aes(x = "", y = perc, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(color = "black") +
  geom_label(aes(label = labels), color = rep(c("white")),
             position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
             show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = stromal.colors) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  ggtitle("Healthy") +
  theme_void() + NoLegend() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

myeloma.pie.plot <- ggplot(myeloma.pie, aes(x = "", y = perc, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(color = "black") +
  geom_label(aes(label = labels), color = rep(c("white")),
             position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
             show.legend = FALSE) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = stromal.colors) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  ggtitle("Myeloma") + theme_void() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  
patchwork.pie <- healthy.pie.plot | myeloma.pie.plot
ggsave("/Users/gagled01/morganLab/single-cell/5TG_Mouse_Rerun/Figure3_PieCharts.png", width = 10, height = 6)
```
# Table 1 - Relative Abundances of Stromal Populations
```{r}
msc.other.ttest <- t.test(msc.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msc.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
olc.other.ttest <- t.test(olc.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(olc.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
sec.other.ttest <- t.test(sec.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(sec.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
aec.other.ttest <- t.test(aec.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(aec.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
fibro.other.ttest <- t.test(fibro.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(fibro.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
chondro.other.ttest <- t.test(chondro.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(chondro.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
peri.other.ttest <- t.test(peri.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(peri.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))

msc.other.ttest
olc.other.ttest
sec.other.ttest
aec.other.ttest
fibro.other.ttest
chondro.other.ttest
peri.other.ttest
```

```{r}
require(data.table)

ra.table <- data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 7, ncol = 6))
colnames(ra.table) <- c("Cell Type", "PBS Mean", "5TGM1 Mean", "95% CI Lower", "95% CI Upper", "p-value")

ra.table$`Cell Type` <- c("MSC", "OLC", "SEC", "AEC", "Fibroblasts", "Chondrocytes", "Pericytes")
ra.table$`PBS Mean` <- c(round(msc.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(olc.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(sec.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(aec.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(fibro.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(chondro.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(peri.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3))
ra.table$`5TGM1 Mean` <- c(round(msc.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(olc.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(sec.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(aec.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(fibro.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(chondro.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(peri.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3))
ra.table$`95% CI Lower` <- c(round(msc.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(olc.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(sec.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(aec.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(fibro.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(chondro.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(peri.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3))
ra.table$`95% CI Upper` <- c(round(msc.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(olc.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(sec.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(aec.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(fibro.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(chondro.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(peri.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3))
ra.table$`p-value` <- c("< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16")

# Combine frames we want for final output
table_caption <- c("Bootstrapped Stromal Relative Abundances", "Table 1") # Define captions

# Run it
stromal.table <- ra.table |>
  flextable() |>
  add_header_lines(values = rev(table_caption)) |>
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") |>
  padding(padding.right = 10, part = "all") |>
  autofit() |>
  bold(part = "header", i = 1) |>
  italic(part = "header", i = c(2:length(table_caption))) |>
  align(part = "header", i = c(1:length(table_caption)), align = "left") |>
  border(part = "head", i = c(1:length(table_caption)),
         border = list("width" = 0, color = "black", style = "solid"))
save_as_docx(stromal.table, path = "/Users/gagled01/morganLab/single-cell/5TGM1_Stromal/figures/allStromal_BootstrappedRelativeAbundances.docx", align = "center")
```
# Table 3 - MSC-lin Relative Abundances #
```{r}
msclins <- readRDS("/Users/gagled01/morganLab/single-cell/5TGM1_Stromal/objects/5TGM1_MSCOLC_Object.rds")
msclins.myeloma <- subset(msclins, subset = case.control %in% "myeloma")
msclins.healthy <- subset(msclins, subset = case.control %in% "control")

# Total cell counts by condition
msclin.myeloma.abundances <- msclins.myeloma@meta.data$seurat_clusters
msclin.healthy.abundances <- msclins.healthy@meta.data$seurat_clusters

# Relative abundances by condition
msclin.myeloma.relabuns <- table(msclins.myeloma@meta.data$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(msclins.myeloma@meta.data$seurat_clusters))
msclin.healthy.relabuns <- table(msclins.healthy@meta.data$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(msclins.healthy@meta.data$seurat_clusters))

# Isolate values for each observed cell type relative abundance for MM
msclin.mm.observed.c0 <-  msclin.myeloma.relabuns[1]
msclin.mm.observed.c1 <-  msclin.myeloma.relabuns[2]
msclin.mm.observed.c2 <-  msclin.myeloma.relabuns[3]
msclin.mm.observed.c3 <-  msclin.myeloma.relabuns[4]
msclin.mm.observed.c4 <-  msclin.myeloma.relabuns[5]
msclin.mm.observed.c5 <-  msclin.myeloma.relabuns[6]

# Isolate values for each observed cell type relative abundance for Healthy
msclin.healthy.observed.c0 <- msclin.healthy.relabuns[1]
msclin.healthy.observed.c1 <- msclin.healthy.relabuns[2]
msclin.healthy.observed.c2 <- msclin.healthy.relabuns[3]
msclin.healthy.observed.c3 <- msclin.healthy.relabuns[4]
msclin.healthy.observed.c4 <- msclin.healthy.relabuns[5]
msclin.healthy.observed.c5 <- msclin.healthy.relabuns[6]

# Total cells by condition
msclin.n_cells_myeloma <- ncol(msclins.myeloma)
msclin.n_cells_healthy <- ncol(msclins.healthy)

# Randomly subsample with replacement and spit out relative abundances
msclin.myeloma.resamples <- lapply(1:100, function(i) table(sample(msclin.myeloma.abundances, replace = T))/msclin.n_cells_myeloma)
msclin.healthy.resamples <- lapply(1:100, function(i) table(sample(msclin.healthy.abundances, replace = T))/msclin.n_cells_healthy)

# Relative abundance distributions for each celltype -- MM
msclin.mm.resamples.c0 <- sapply(msclin.myeloma.resamples,"[[",1)
msclin.mm.resamples.c1 <- sapply(msclin.myeloma.resamples,"[[",2)
msclin.mm.resamples.c2 <- sapply(msclin.myeloma.resamples,"[[",3)
msclin.mm.resamples.c3 <- sapply(msclin.myeloma.resamples,"[[",4)
msclin.mm.resamples.c4 <- sapply(msclin.myeloma.resamples,"[[",5)
msclin.mm.resamples.c5 <- sapply(msclin.myeloma.resamples,"[[",6)

# Relative abundance distributions for each celltype -- Healthy
msclin.healthy.resamples.c0 <- sapply(msclin.healthy.resamples,"[[",1)
msclin.healthy.resamples.c1 <- sapply(msclin.healthy.resamples,"[[",2)
msclin.healthy.resamples.c2 <- sapply(msclin.healthy.resamples,"[[",3)
msclin.healthy.resamples.c3 <- sapply(msclin.healthy.resamples,"[[",4)
msclin.healthy.resamples.c4 <- sapply(msclin.healthy.resamples,"[[",5)
msclin.healthy.resamples.c5 <- sapply(msclin.healthy.resamples,"[[",6)

msclin.c0.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = msclin.mm.resamples.c0, Healthy = msclin.healthy.resamples.c0, Cluster = "0"))
colnames(msclin.c0.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
msclin.c1.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = msclin.mm.resamples.c1, Healthy = msclin.healthy.resamples.c1, Cluster = "1"))
colnames(msclin.c1.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
msclin.c2.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = msclin.mm.resamples.c2, Healthy = msclin.healthy.resamples.c2, Cluster = "2"))
colnames(msclin.c2.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
msclin.c3.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = msclin.mm.resamples.c3, Healthy = msclin.healthy.resamples.c3, Cluster = "3"))
colnames(msclin.c3.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
msclin.c4.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = msclin.mm.resamples.c4, Healthy = msclin.healthy.resamples.c4, Cluster = "4"))
colnames(msclin.c4.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
msclin.c5.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = msclin.mm.resamples.c5, Healthy = msclin.healthy.resamples.c5, Cluster = "5"))
colnames(msclin.c5.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"

msclin.c0.other.ttest <- t.test(msclin.c0.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msclin.c0.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
msclin.c1.other.ttest <- t.test(msclin.c1.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msclin.c1.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
msclin.c2.other.ttest <- t.test(msclin.c2.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msclin.c2.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
msclin.c3.other.ttest <- t.test(msclin.c3.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msclin.c3.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
msclin.c4.other.ttest <- t.test(msclin.c4.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msclin.c4.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
msclin.c5.other.ttest <- t.test(msclin.c5.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(msclin.c5.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
```
# Table 2 MSC-lins #
```{r}
msclin.ra.table <- data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 6, ncol = 6))
colnames(msclin.ra.table) <- c("Subcluster", "PBS Mean", "5TGM1 Mean", "95% CI Lower", "95% CI Upper", "p-value")

msclin.ra.table$`Subcluster` <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")
msclin.ra.table$`PBS Mean` <- c(round(msclin.c0.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(msclin.c1.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(msclin.c2.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(msclin.c3.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(msclin.c4.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(msclin.c5.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3))
msclin.ra.table$`5TGM1 Mean` <- c(round(msclin.c0.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(msclin.c1.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(msclin.c2.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(msclin.c3.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(msclin.c4.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(msclin.c5.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3))
msclin.ra.table$`95% CI Lower` <- c(round(msclin.c0.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(msclin.c1.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(msclin.c2.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(msclin.c3.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(msclin.c4.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(msclin.c5.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3))
msclin.ra.table$`95% CI Upper` <- c(round(msclin.c0.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(msclin.c1.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(msclin.c2.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(msclin.c3.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(msclin.c4.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(msclin.c5.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3))
msclin.ra.table$`p-value` <- c("< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16")

# Combine frames we want for final output
table_caption <- c("Bootstrapped MSC-lineage Subcluster Relative Abundances", "Table 2") # Define captions

# Run it
stromal.table <- msclin.ra.table |>
  flextable() |>
  add_header_lines(values = rev(table_caption)) |>
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") |>
  padding(padding.right = 10, part = "all") |>
  autofit() |>
  bold(part = "header", i = 1) |>
  italic(part = "header", i = c(2:length(table_caption))) |>
  align(part = "header", i = c(1:length(table_caption)), align = "left") |>
  border(part = "head", i = c(1:length(table_caption)),
         border = list("width" = 0, color = "black", style = "solid"))
save_as_docx(stromal.table, path = "/Users/gagled01/morganLab/single-cell/5TGM1_Stromal/figures/MSClineage_BootstrappedRelativeAbundances_FlexTable.docx", align = "center")
```

# Table 3 - BMEC Relative Abundances #
```{r}
bmecs <- readRDS("/Users/gagled01/morganLab/single-cell/5TGM1_Stromal/objects/5TGM1_BMEC_Object.rds")
bmecs.myeloma <- subset(bmecs, subset = case.control %in% "myeloma")
bmecs.healthy <- subset(bmecs, subset = case.control %in% "control")

# Total cell counts by condition
bmec.myeloma.abundances <- bmecs.myeloma@meta.data$seurat_clusters
bmec.healthy.abundances <- bmecs.healthy@meta.data$seurat_clusters

# Relative abundances by condition
bmec.myeloma.relabuns <- table(bmecs.myeloma@meta.data$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(bmecs.myeloma@meta.data$seurat_clusters))
bmec.healthy.relabuns <- table(bmecs.healthy@meta.data$seurat_clusters)/sum(table(bmecs.healthy@meta.data$seurat_clusters))

# Isolate values for each observed cell type relative abundance for MM
bmec.mm.observed.c0 <-  bmec.myeloma.relabuns[1]
bmec.mm.observed.c1 <-  bmec.myeloma.relabuns[2]
bmec.mm.observed.c2 <-  bmec.myeloma.relabuns[3]
bmec.mm.observed.c3 <-  bmec.myeloma.relabuns[4]
bmec.mm.observed.c4 <-  bmec.myeloma.relabuns[5]
bmec.mm.observed.c5 <-  bmec.myeloma.relabuns[6]

# Isolate values for each observed cell type relative abundance for Healthy
bmec.healthy.observed.c0 <- bmec.healthy.relabuns[1]
bmec.healthy.observed.c1 <- bmec.healthy.relabuns[2]
bmec.healthy.observed.c2 <- bmec.healthy.relabuns[3]
bmec.healthy.observed.c3 <- bmec.healthy.relabuns[4]
bmec.healthy.observed.c4 <- bmec.healthy.relabuns[5]
bmec.healthy.observed.c5 <- bmec.healthy.relabuns[6]

# Total cells by condition
bmec.n_cells_myeloma <- ncol(bmecs.myeloma)
bmec.n_cells_healthy <- ncol(bmecs.healthy)

# Randomly subsample with replacement and spit out relative abundances
bmec.myeloma.resamples <- lapply(1:100, function(i) table(sample(bmec.myeloma.abundances, replace = T))/bmec.n_cells_myeloma)
bmec.healthy.resamples <- lapply(1:100, function(i) table(sample(bmec.healthy.abundances, replace = T))/bmec.n_cells_healthy)

# Relative abundance distributions for each celltype -- MM
bmec.mm.resamples.c0 <- sapply(bmec.myeloma.resamples,"[[",1)
bmec.mm.resamples.c1 <- sapply(bmec.myeloma.resamples,"[[",2)
bmec.mm.resamples.c2 <- sapply(bmec.myeloma.resamples,"[[",3)
bmec.mm.resamples.c3 <- sapply(bmec.myeloma.resamples,"[[",4)
bmec.mm.resamples.c4 <- sapply(bmec.myeloma.resamples,"[[",5)
bmec.mm.resamples.c5 <- sapply(bmec.myeloma.resamples,"[[",6)

# Relative abundance distributions for each celltype -- Healthy
bmec.healthy.resamples.c0 <- sapply(bmec.healthy.resamples,"[[",1)
bmec.healthy.resamples.c1 <- sapply(bmec.healthy.resamples,"[[",2)
bmec.healthy.resamples.c2 <- sapply(bmec.healthy.resamples,"[[",3)
bmec.healthy.resamples.c3 <- sapply(bmec.healthy.resamples,"[[",4)
bmec.healthy.resamples.c4 <- sapply(bmec.healthy.resamples,"[[",5)
bmec.healthy.resamples.c5 <- sapply(bmec.healthy.resamples,"[[",6)

bmec.c0.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = bmec.mm.resamples.c0, Healthy = bmec.healthy.resamples.c0, Cluster = "0"))
colnames(bmec.c0.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
bmec.c1.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = bmec.mm.resamples.c1, Healthy = bmec.healthy.resamples.c1, Cluster = "1"))
colnames(bmec.c1.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
bmec.c2.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = bmec.mm.resamples.c2, Healthy = bmec.healthy.resamples.c2, Cluster = "2"))
colnames(bmec.c2.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
bmec.c3.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = bmec.mm.resamples.c3, Healthy = bmec.healthy.resamples.c3, Cluster = "3"))
colnames(bmec.c3.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
bmec.c4.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = bmec.mm.resamples.c4, Healthy = bmec.healthy.resamples.c4, Cluster = "4"))
colnames(bmec.c4.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"
bmec.c5.plotting.df <- melt(data.frame(Myeloma = bmec.mm.resamples.c5, Healthy = bmec.healthy.resamples.c5, Cluster = "5"))
colnames(bmec.c5.plotting.df)[2] <- "Condition"

bmec.c0.other.ttest <- t.test(bmec.c0.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(bmec.c0.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
bmec.c1.other.ttest <- t.test(bmec.c1.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(bmec.c1.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
bmec.c2.other.ttest <- t.test(bmec.c2.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(bmec.c2.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
bmec.c3.other.ttest <- t.test(bmec.c3.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(bmec.c3.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
bmec.c4.other.ttest <- t.test(bmec.c4.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(bmec.c4.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
bmec.c5.other.ttest <- t.test(bmec.c5.plotting.df$value ~ as.character(bmec.c5.plotting.df$Condition), alternative = c("two.sided"))
```
# Table 3 BMECs #
```{r}
bmec.ra.table <- data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 6, ncol = 6))
colnames(bmec.ra.table) <- c("Subcluster", "PBS Mean", "5TGM1 Mean", "95% CI Lower", "95% CI Upper", "p-value")

bmec.ra.table$`Subcluster` <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")
bmec.ra.table$`PBS Mean` <- c(round(bmec.c0.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(bmec.c1.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(bmec.c2.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(bmec.c3.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(bmec.c4.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3),
                         round(bmec.c5.other.ttest$estimate[1], 3))
bmec.ra.table$`5TGM1 Mean` <- c(round(bmec.c0.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(bmec.c1.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(bmec.c2.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(bmec.c3.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(bmec.c4.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3),
                         round(bmec.c5.other.ttest$estimate[2], 3))
bmec.ra.table$`95% CI Lower` <- c(round(bmec.c0.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(bmec.c1.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(bmec.c2.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(bmec.c3.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(bmec.c4.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3),
                             round(bmec.c5.other.ttest$conf.int[1],3))
bmec.ra.table$`95% CI Upper` <- c(round(bmec.c0.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(bmec.c1.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(bmec.c2.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(bmec.c3.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(bmec.c4.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3),
                             round(bmec.c5.other.ttest$conf.int[2],3))
bmec.ra.table$`p-value` <- c("< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "< 2.2e-16", "0.2093", "< 2.2e-16")

# Combine frames we want for final output
table_caption <- c("Bootstrapped BMEC Subcluster Relative Abundances", "Table 3") # Define captions

# Run it
stromal.table <- bmec.ra.table |>
  flextable() |>
  add_header_lines(values = rev(table_caption)) |>
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") |>
  padding(padding.right = 10, part = "all") |>
  autofit() |>
  bold(part = "header", i = 1) |>
  italic(part = "header", i = c(2:length(table_caption))) |>
  align(part = "header", i = c(1:length(table_caption)), align = "left") |>
  border(part = "head", i = c(1:length(table_caption)),
         border = list("width" = 0, color = "black", style = "solid"))
save_as_docx(stromal.table, path = "/Users/gagled01/morganLab/single-cell/5TGM1_Stromal/figures/BMEC_BootstrappedRelativeAbundances_FlexTable.docx", align = "center")
```
